opinion: Immigration, borders, and nations are stupid social constructs of the past; Earth is the only nation and all people should be free to move and live wherever they want without restriction.
Abolish all borders and ICE; provide immediate citizenship and full benefits to anyone who arrives.
Grant full amnesty to all undocumented immigrants and stop all deportations immediately.
Increase legal immigration levels, expand access to asylum seekers and improve immigration timelines.
Maintain border security, current levels of legal immigration and background check vetting of asylum seekers.

Implement zero-tolerance enforcement with mass deportation of all undocumented individuals, end catch-and-release, expand border walls and surveillance, deploy the military to prevent unauthorized entry, ban asylum, and limit immigration to legal channels only.
Terminate birthright citizenship. Total moratorium on all immigration; complete closure of borders.
Forced removal and remigration of all non-citizens and naturalized citizens.
There is nothing more important than national identity, and this starts and ends with how you look; round up all non-whites and get them out, no questions asked.
